zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth於1190年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，他的父親Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth23歲，母親Alice Greystoke28歲。他於大約1215年與Alice de Stavelegh在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1243年1月13日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾。

zh-hans.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United: 英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh-hans.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth于1190年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，他的父亲Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth23岁，母亲Alice Greystoke28岁。他于大约1215年与Alice de Stavelegh在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1243年1月13日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHenry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Henry (see Henry ), ‘son of Henry’. This surname is common in Ireland (mainly Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Éinrí. In at least some cases, it seems to have been adopted as a surname indicating the illegitimate offspring of a man called Henry.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Randolph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman given name, Old Norse Rannulfr, derived from rand ‘rim, shield’ (or hrafn ‘raven’) + úlfr ‘wolf’.

variants.name: Randulf
meanings: From a Norman given name, Old Norse Rannulfr, derived from rand ‘rim, shield’ (or hrafn ‘raven’) + úlfr ‘wolf’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth was born in 1190, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, his father, Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth, was 23 and his mother, Alice Greystoke, was 28. He married Alice de Stavelegh about 1215, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 13 January 1243, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth est né en 1190, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Greystoke, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Stavelegh environ 1215, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1243, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth 1190 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth 23 und seine Mutter Alice Greystoke 28. Er hat um 1215 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice de Stavelegh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Januar 1243 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth è nato il nel 1190 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice Greystoke, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Stavelegh circa 1215, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 gennaio 1243, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルス
ja.Jervaulx Abbey, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworthが1190年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworthは23歳，母Alice Greystokeは28歳であった。約1215年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでAlice de Staveleghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1243年1月13日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth(이)가 1190년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Greystoke(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Alice de Stavelegh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1243년 1월 13일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United: Ravensworth, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth nasceu em 1190, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Greystoke, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Stavelegh aproximadamente 1215, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1243, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth родился в 1190 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Greystoke, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Stavelegh около 1215 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 января 1243 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Randolph FitzHenry of Ravensworth nació en 1190, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry FitzHervey of Ravensworth, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Greystoke, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Alice de Stavelegh aproximadamente 1215, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de enero de 1243, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
